summary_en: ¥12.0B upper limit, 12,000,000 shares (2.82% of S/O), open-market acquisition via Tokyo Stock Exchange, execution window 1 June 2026–31 March 2027. Stated purpose: capital efficiency and shareholder return.
title_en: Notice on determination of matters concerning acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition based on articles of incorporation under the Company Law Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief: Kyushu Financial Group's board resolved on 14 May 2026 to acquire treasury shares under the authority of the Company Law. The authorization covers up to 12,000,000 ordinary shares (representing 2.82% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) at a maximum cash outlay of ¥12.0 billion. Acquisition will be conducted through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange over the period 1 June 2026 to 31 March 2027. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and return value to shareholders through flexible capital allocation.
